_expected_violation: cohort_size (3) < privacy_threshold (5) violates the k-anonymity relational invariant. ADR-0013 states this relation is NOT expressible in JSON Schema 2020-12 (no cross-field comparison operator) — schema-level validation alone WILL pass this instance. A publish-side runtime gate (W2A) is required to reject it. This fixture is preserved permanently as a regression/documentation artifact, not as a schema-validation-failure case.
_note: not schema-detectable, runtime-gate case per ADR-0013 — permanent fixture, do not delete when W2A gate ships.
